name: Upshur County Recreation Park
description: Upshur County Recreation Park is a place to play pickleball in Buckhannon, WV. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Wesleyan's old tennis courts
description: Wesleyan's old tennis courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Buckhannon, WV. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.
